name: the produced v1.1 profile validates against the committed business-profile JSON schema
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/full-surface-intake.sh" --workload "React SPA on Kubernetes" --answers p.json --probe-answer react_rendering_model=spa --partial --out v11.json --now 2026-07-04T00:00:00Z >/dev/null 2>&1; node "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/lib/validate-json-schema.js" "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/schemas/business-profile.schema.json" v11.json && echo v11-schema-valid 1>&2
setup: printf '%s' '{"workload":"React SPA with REST API on Kubernetes via Terraform","motivation":"revenue","criticality":"mission-critical","availability_tolerance":"minutes","data_loss_tolerance":"minutes","data_sensitivity":"confidential","compliance_regime":"soc2","scale":"large","budget_posture":"balanced"}' > p.json
